## Checklist

- [ ] CI is green (typecheck, tests, build)
- [ ] UI strings added to **both** locales (en + ja) where applicable
- [ ] No security invariant weakened (OTP hashing, single-use grants,
      sealed cookies, `safeReturnTo`, server-side plan/ownership checks)
- [ ] Examples use the vanilla cast (Project Falcon / Acme / Globex)
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`, DCO)
